gh_db7b29e6b9c9b5ad8788f6ac.title: [Beginner]: Add argparse to generate_companies.py for command-line options
gh_db7b29e6b9c9b5ad8788f6ac.description: Currently, generate_companies.py hardcodes the number of companies to generate (e.g., 4000, 1900, 1300) in the __main__ block. This issue is to use argparse to allow these to be passed as command-line arguments (e.g., --greenhouse-count 4000).
